item.title: Planting Big Sweet Corn
item.description: Step-by-step guide to planting large sweet corn, covering spacing, soil preparation, and care tips for a healthy and productive harvest.

media:content.media:title: Planting Big Sweet Corn
media:content.media:description: Step-by-step guide to planting large sweet corn, covering spacing, soil preparation, and care tips for a healthy and productive harvest.

item.title: First Time Driving the Bobcat T595
item.description: Watch a first-time experience operating the Bobcat T595, showcasing handling, controls, and performance on various tasks around the farm.

media:content.media:title: First Time Driving the Bobcat T595
media:content.media:description: Watch a first-time experience operating the Bobcat T595, showcasing handling, controls, and performance on various tasks around the farm.

item.title: Combine Too Small for Everyone
item.description: See the challenges of fitting multiple people in a combine, highlighting space limitations and the realities of operating farm machinery efficiently.

media:content.media:title: Combine Too Small for Everyone
media:content.media:description: See the challenges of fitting multiple people in a combine, highlighting space limitations and the realities of operating farm machinery efficiently.

item.title: Farming Is Like a Gym Workout
item.description: Explore how farming tasks mimic gym exercises, highlighting the physical effort, strength, and endurance required in daily farm work.

media:content.media:title: Farming Is Like a Gym Workout
media:content.media:description: Explore how farming tasks mimic gym exercises, highlighting the physical effort, strength, and endurance required in daily farm work.

item.title: Using Our New Dump Truck
item.description: See how we put our new dump truck to work, handling hauling, transporting materials, and improving efficiency on the farm and property.

media:content.media:title: Using Our New Dump Truck
media:content.media:description: See how we put our new dump truck to work, handling hauling, transporting materials, and improving efficiency on the farm and property.

item.title: Using a Skidsteer on the Farm
item.description: Watch a skidsteer in action on the farm, performing tasks like lifting, moving materials, and assisting with everyday agricultural work.

media:content.media:title: Using a Skidsteer on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Watch a skidsteer in action on the farm, performing tasks like lifting, moving materials, and assisting with everyday agricultural work.

item.title: Learning Fendt, One Mishap at a Time
item.description: Join us as we navigate and learn a Fendt tractor, overcoming small mishaps while mastering controls, handling, and field operations.

media:content.media:title: Learning Fendt, One Mishap at a Time
media:content.media:description: Join us as we navigate and learn a Fendt tractor, overcoming small mishaps while mastering controls, handling, and field operations.

item.title: Big Kids Playing in Sandboxes
item.description: Watch adults enjoying playful fun in sandboxes, showcasing creative builds, friendly competition, and the joy of hands-on sand activities.

media:content.media:title: Big Kids Playing in Sandboxes
media:content.media:description: Watch adults enjoying playful fun in sandboxes, showcasing creative builds, friendly competition, and the joy of hands-on sand activities.

item.title: Wildfire Threatens Local Beef Supply
item.description: A severe wildfire is putting our cattle and beef production at risk, highlighting the impact on livestock, farms, and the local food supply.

media:content.media:title: Wildfire Threatens Local Beef Supply
media:content.media:description: A severe wildfire is putting our cattle and beef production at risk, highlighting the impact on livestock, farms, and the local food supply.

item.title: Mud Spa Day Experience
item.description: Enjoy a relaxing spa day in the mud, highlighting natural treatments, soothing textures, and the satisfying experience of a full-body mud soak.

media:content.media:title: Mud Spa Day Experience
media:content.media:description: Enjoy a relaxing spa day in the mud, highlighting natural treatments, soothing textures, and the satisfying experience of a full-body mud soak.

item.title: Exploring the Grain Bin
item.description: Step inside a grain bin to see its structure, storage capacity, and safety tips while exploring how grain is stored and managed on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Exploring the Grain Bin
media:content.media:description: Step inside a grain bin to see its structure, storage capacity, and safety tips while exploring how grain is stored and managed on the farm.

item.title: Seeding Grass in a Large Yard
item.description: Step-by-step process for seeding grass in a big yard, including soil prep, spreading techniques, and tips for achieving a lush, healthy lawn.

media:content.media:title: Seeding Grass in a Large Yard
media:content.media:description: Step-by-step process for seeding grass in a big yard, including soil prep, spreading techniques, and tips for achieving a lush, healthy lawn.
